def positive_repository_method_accepts_pydantic_request_schema():
    rule_id = "repository_method_accepts_pydantic_request_schema"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Repository method parameter type is a Pydantic request schema that belongs to the presentation layer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
